title: Assistant Store Manager - Haldiram's - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Haldiram's - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Haldiram's is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haldiram's:
Haldiram's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's!
